infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GoPlay uses your location to show nearby courts and fields and help you check whether they are busy before you go.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GoPlay uses background location to detect when you arrive at public sports spaces so availability stays accurate without storing raw coordinates.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: GoPlay uses background location to update court and field availability when you enter or leave a sports space.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: GoPlay uses your location to show nearby courts and fields and help you know before you go.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GoPlay uses background location to detect when you arrive at a sports space so live availability stays accurate.
